title: PluginPermissions
description: Plugin permission model for the Unified AI Plugin Platform. Declares what system resources a plugin requires access to. Corresponds to PluginPermissions and PluginCapabilities messages in the core plugin.proto.

level.description: Overall permission level: limited (read-only, no network), standard (read/write local), full (all access including network and system)

network.description: Network access permissions: connect (TCP client), listen (TCP server), outbound (general egress), http (HTTP client)
